assets.purpose: Communicate a calm premium desk setup for USB-C connectivity and everyday expansion.
assets.environment: Very light gray wall with a clean light wood desk surface.

productHierarchy.hero: Slim aluminum USB-C multimedia hub angled to show ports clearly.
supporting: One compact USB-C adapter placed lower and smaller.
One softly coiled USB-C cable used as a subtle supporting object.

assets.extraDirection: Keep the left side open for headline and CTA copy on desktop; keep the top open on mobile.

assets.purpose: Show the charger category as compact, powerful, and premium.
assets.environment: White wall and seamless very light gray surface.

productHierarchy.hero: Compact GaN wall charger standing upright as the dominant object.
supporting: One USB-C cable connector placed quietly near the base.

assets.purpose: Clarify durable braided cable texture and premium connector finish.
assets.environment: Very light gray wall with minimal surface.

productHierarchy.hero: Close crop of braided USB-C cable and connector.
supporting: A gentle cable curve leading out of frame.

assets.purpose: Promote travel-ready compact charging without using travel clutter.
assets.environment: White wall with clean light wood desk edge.

productHierarchy.hero: Compact travel wall charger as the main object.
supporting: One neatly placed USB-C cable connector.

assets.extraDirection: Suggest travel readiness through compact scale only; do not add luggage, passports, maps, or other props.
